reviews.review_description:
This game is VERY clearly and heavily inspired by BONELAB. Void G116/Main Menu is practically ported from BONELAB to BONEREALM. 

Besides that, it's an...alright game, so far. All you can do is enter in a code and you get mags + a pistol and a...cube? For some reason?

I'm tempted to think a BONEREALM update will come out before Patch 4 of BONELAB

developer_response.body: It may be getting a rehaul soon.

reviews.review_description: THIS IS THE BEST GAME I'VE EVER PLAYED!!!!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for that, I might have a small break from it though.

reviews.review_description:
The New Update, I give it a 8.7/10
but the only thing that brings that rating down is the skybox on the user agreement scene

reviews.review_title: Can’t load in to the levels still waitin

developer_response.body: The levels are not finished yet. I am still waiting on approval.

reviews.review_description: Honestly? Pretty good. I'd love to see more updates.
Please update the game i beg you like ive been wanting to play the levels and stuff please like this game got potential please
I’ve seen this game quite some time ago in legend has it to this day. I’m still waiting for the level to load.
I just installed it and I think scince I'm too broke to buy bonelab....someone gift me.... and I think it has great potential

developer_response.body: Sadly, it has come to an end. This is due to the absurd amount of hate that was caused by the project.

reviews.review_title: I wish it worked properly on my console
reviews.review_description: I couldn't load into the levels and I wish I could play it.
